source_old_req: The MAGNETO thread shall execute periodically with a period of 80 milliseconds and a priority of 4. The MAGNETO.IMPL implementation shall ensure that the mag_in_data_x, mag_in_data_y, and mag_in_data_z input ports receive valid values of type AHRS::Data_Types::FLOAT32_TYPE_AADL. The MAGNETO thread shall guarantee that the mag_out_data_x, mag_out_data_y, and mag_out_data_z output ports are updated only based on the current values of the input ports and internal computations performed by the MAGNETO thread. Additionally, the MAGNETO thread shall guarantee that the values written to the mag_out_data_x, mag_out_data_y, and mag_out_data_z output ports remain within the bounds of the AHRS::Data_Types::FLOAT32_TYPE_AADL data type.
natural_requirement: The MAGNETO component shall define the implementation-level signal routing for MAGNETO.IMPL. In the implementation layer, MAGNETO.IMPL shall route data flow from magneto_sub.mag_out_data_x to mag_out_data_x through MAG_PC1 and data flow from magneto_sub.mag_out_data_y to mag_out_data_y through MAG_PC2.

requirement_items.text: The MAGNETO.IMPL implementation shall route the data flow from magneto_sub.mag_out_data_x to mag_out_data_x through connection MAG_PC1.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The MAGNETO.IMPL implementation shall declare connection MAG_PC1 from magneto_sub.mag_out_data_x to mag_out_data_x.

requirement_items.text: The MAGNETO.IMPL implementation shall route the data flow from magneto_sub.mag_out_data_y to mag_out_data_y through connection MAG_PC2.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The MAGNETO.IMPL implementation shall declare connection MAG_PC2 from magneto_sub.mag_out_data_y to mag_out_data_y.

quality_policy.traceable: Every item has trace_refs and expected_check metadata tied to AADL facts.
quality_policy.principle: Every generated sentence must name an explicit property assignment or structural connection; ordinary feature declarations are not used as rebuilt requirements.

natural_requirement_before_behavior_styl: The MAGNETO.IMPL implementation shall declare connection MAG_PC1 from magneto_sub.mag_out_data_x to mag_out_data_x. The MAGNETO.IMPL implementation shall declare connection MAG_PC2 from magneto_sub.mag_out_data_y to mag_out_data_y.

behavior_style_policy.basis: front-110 AGREE-derived requirements favor implementable behavior, constants, assumptions, guarantees, routing, and bounded properties.
behavior_style_policy.rule: Do not describe unsupported validity/legal-boundary semantics unless the AADL model exposes variables, values, or properties that can implement them.

natural_requirement_before_paragraph_rew: The MAGNETO.IMPL implementation shall route the data flow from magneto_sub.mag_out_data_x to mag_out_data_x through connection MAG_PC1. The MAGNETO.IMPL implementation shall route the data flow from magneto_sub.mag_out_data_y to mag_out_data_y through connection MAG_PC2.

paragraph_style_policy.rule: Req.txt is written as a natural-language requirement paragraph; per-item traceability stays in requirement_items.
paragraph_style_policy.basis: Front-110 AGREE-derived requirements generally combine function, assumptions, guarantees, and implementation notes into 1-4 sentence paragraphs.
